action.description: The committee on PBS recommend that the measure be PASSED, WITH AMENDMENTS. The votes were as follows: 7 Ayes: Representative(s) Belatti, Iwamoto, Hashem, Ichiyama, Woodson, Souza; Ayes with reservations: Representative(s) Shimizu; 0 Noes: none; and 2 Excused: Representative(s) Morikawa, Poepoe.
